company.name_jp: 株式会社エイ・シー・ティ

research_notes: Found detailed executive information on company profile page (http://a-c-t.co.jp/about.html). Listed 7 officers: 1 representative director/president (板橋哲也), 5 directors (石原健一, 中川勇起夫, 遠藤毅, 増田紀之, 佐藤武次), 1 auditor (中川麻弓). Established 1989 (昭和元年), capital 49M yen. Located in Fujisawa, Kanagawa. System/app development from construction to operation. KIA member. Privacy Mark obtained 2006. Labor dispatch business permitted.
